title: Maximum Consecutive Floors Without Special Floors
titleCn: 不含特殊楼层的最大连续楼层数

testcases.input: bottom = 2, top = 9, special = [4,6] Output: 3 Explanation: The following are the ranges (inclusive) of consecutive floors without a special floor: - (2, 3) with a total amount of 2 floors. - (5, 5) with a total amount of 1 floor. - (7, 9) with a total amount of 3 floors. Therefore, we return the maximum number which is 3 floors.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The following are the ranges (inclusive) of consecutive floors without a special floor: - (2, 3) with a total amount of 2 floors. - (5, 5) with a total amount of 1 floor. - (7, 9) with a total amount of 3 floors. Therefore, we return the maximum number which is 3 floors.

testcases.input: bottom = 6, top = 8, special = [7,6,8] Output: 0 Explanation: Every floor rented is a special floor, so we return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Every floor rented is a special floor, so we return 0.
